description: Jack, also known as Vibes, discusses Web3 security best practices at Breakpoint 2023. He emphasizes the importance of establishing a secure environment for development, managing private keys, and monitoring wallets. Key points include using dedicated machines, installing ad blockers, bookmarking trusted dapps, and setting up two-factor authentication. He advises against using SMS for two-factor authentication and highlights the risks of remote access applications. Jack also covers the significance of maintaining a security mindset and using tools like Docker and automated security tools for smart contract development.
topic_summary: Jack presents on Web3 security, covering secure environments, private key management, and wallet monitoring. He provides practical tips for developers and users to enhance their security practices.
